title: BAI Issues Form-1 Circular for Badminton Sportspersons
indian_angle: This circular from BAI directly impacts Indian badminton players requiring Form-1 for various purposes.
summary: The Badminton Association of India (BAI) has released a circular regarding the issuance of Form-1 for badminton sportspersons.

title: Yonex-Sunrise Sub-Junior National Ranking Tournament Dates Revised
indian_angle: The change in dates for these national ranking tournaments directly affects young Indian badminton talents.
summary: The dates for the Yonex-Sunrise All India Sub-Junior National Ranking Badminton Tournaments in Jaipur and Patna have been rescheduled.

title: BAI President Sarma on Monkeys at India Open: "What is the problem?"
indian_angle: The statement from BAI President Himanta Biswa Sarma addresses an unusual incident at a major Indian badminton event.
summary: BAI President Himanta Biswa Sarma commented on the presence of monkeys at the India Open, asking "What is the problem if monkeys come to watch a game?".

title: Indian Shuttlers Urged to Develop Independent Thinking, Win Without Coach
indian_angle: This opinion piece discusses a crucial aspect of player development for Indian shuttlers, advocating for self-reliance on court.
summary: An article suggests that Indian shuttlers should learn to think on their feet and win matches without constant coaching presence, highlighting the need for independent decision-making.

title: New 3x15 Scoring System Adopted for Junior Domestic Tournaments
indian_angle: This new scoring system will be implemented across various junior domestic ranking tournaments and national championships in India.
summary: The 3x15 scoring system will be implemented in domestic ranking tournaments and national championships for U-13, U-15, and U-17 age groups.

title: Kidambi Srikanth Reaches US Open Final, Falls to Su Li Yang
indian_angle: Former World No. 1 Kidambi Srikanth's deep run to the final of an international tournament is a significant achievement for Indian badminton.
summary: Indian shuttler Kidambi Srikanth reached the final of the US Open but was defeated by Su Li Yang in the last step.
